name: Code Validator Skill
description: A template skill for validating code quality and test coverage

prompts.name: validate-quality
prompts.content: Validate code quality against best practices including naming conventions, complexity, and documentation.

prompts.name: generate-tests
prompts.content: Generate comprehensive unit tests for the provided code, including happy path and edge cases.

prompts.name: check-coverage
prompts.content: Analyze test coverage and identify untested code paths and edge cases.

examples.input: function divide(a, b) { return a / b; }
examples.output: Missing: zero divisor check, type validation, documentation
